permissionDefinition.code: Unique key used by route and page maintainers. Prefer stable snake_case or dot notation.
permissionDefinition.name: The display name shown to administrators when managing permissions.
permissionDefinition.description: Optional internal description for this permission.
permissionDefinition.isActive: Passive permissions are not taken into account when calculating user access.
permissionDefinition.save: The changes affect role and group authorization flows.

permissionGroup.name: Group name for identification when assigning to users.
permissionGroup.isSystemAdmin: Members of this group can access all pages and actions without individual permission checks.
permissionGroup.isActive: Passive groups should not be assigned for new access decisions.
permissionGroup.permissions: The permissions chosen determine what members of this group can access.
permissionGroup.save: Updates the current access for all users assigned to this group.

userAssignment.user: Select the user whose access scope you want to manage.
userAssignment.groups: The user gets combined permissions from all selected groups.
userAssignment.save: Assignments are applied immediately for the next authorization checks. Users can renew their sessions.
userAssignment.systemAdminNote: If the user has a system administrator group, detailed permissions are skipped.

permissionDefinitions.title: Permission Definitions
permissionDefinitions.description: Manage permission codes used in the system

form.affectedRoutesNone: No matching route found for this code
form.name: Name

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

permissionDefinitions.missingCodes: {{count}} missing permission code found. CRUD records are automatically synchronized.

permissionGroups.title: Permission Groups
permissionGroups.matrixDescription: Each row represents a screen or resource. Define more controlled access by selecting View, Create, Update and Delete privileges separately.

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

permissionGroups.systemAdminLocked: System Admin group privileges are locked and cannot be changed.

userGroupAssignments.title: User Group Assignments
userGroupAssignments.selectUserHint: Select a user to manage permission group assignments
